CMLT - Comparative Literature

CLFS660 Biodiversity and Conservation Biology (3 Credits) Application of ecological and evolutionary principles to assess the impact of the human species on the environment and its inhabitants. Speciﬁc case studies are included to illustrate problems of bidiversityloss and actions required to reverse the trends.

CMLT469 The Continental Novel (3 Credits) The novel in translation from Stendhal through the existentialists, selected from literatures of France, Germany, Italy, Russia, and Spain.
